title: imageSize 512 rejected by gemini-3.1-flash-image (API per-model size support)
description: Live smoke (plan-003 Issue 5.2) found gemini-3.1-flash-image rejects imageConfig.imageSize=512 ('Image size 512 is not supported for this model', HTTP non-200 -> ExitAPI 5), though 1K/2K/4K work. naba's client-side ValidImageSizes includes 512 (per the docs/E1 enum). Options: (a) document that 512 is model-dependent, (b) drop 512 from the validated set, or (c) per-model size validation. Low priority: the API returns a clear error and naba surfaces it; no silent failure.
close_reason: Resolved by plan-004 Rust rewrite: image-size validation is now provider/model-aware (SPEC-IMG-007). GeminiProvider rejects imageSize=512 for gemini-3.1-flash-image (which does not support it) with a pre-HTTP usage error, instead of the old global ValidImageSizes list that let 512 through to fail at the API. Validated by parity case prec-imageconfig-flag-over-config (exit 2). Merged to main + full suite green.
